Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Will you please add me as a member in today's search party?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I want to participate in lots of battles and get used to handling my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}All right! I hope I can prove myself useful to all of you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Don't worry, I have no intention of doing so.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But, I do want to do whatever I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}So, um... I'd be very grateful if you let me come and fight alongside you![n]{f 1 1}
